rkm.project.golfgame

    • Method Detail

      • x

        public T x()
        Retrieve value of x coordinate
        Returns:
        x coordinate value

      • y

        public T y()
        Retrieve value of y coordinate
        Returns:
        y coordinate value

      • setX

        public void setX(T x)
        Set a new value for x coordinate
        Parameters:
        x - new value for x coordinate

      • setY

        public void setY(T y)
        Set a new value for y coordinate
        Parameters:
        y - new value for y coordinate

      • halfSpace

        public int halfSpace(Line line)
        Determine if point belongs to a half space of a line
        Parameters:
        line - that allows to check whether this point belongs to one of it's half space
        Returns:
        0 if this point is on the line, 1 if point is in lower half space of the line and 2 if it's in the upper half space of the line

      • halfSpaceSeg

        public int halfSpaceSeg(Segment segment)
        Determine if point belongs to a half space of a segment
        Parameters:
        segment - that allows to check whether this point belongs to one of it's half space
        Returns:
        0 if this point is on the segment, 1 if point is in lower half space of the segment and 2 if it's in the upper half space of the segment

      • equals

        public boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
        Check if this point equals another point
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object
        Parameters:
        obj - to compare with this point
        Returns:
        boolean true if this point equals obj else return false
